title: action — one concrete next step on one project
description: Progress lands in the dated log, through tools/log.py — the record, not the chat, is the memory (OVERVIEW rule 3). follow_up is the deliberate placeholder for open question 1 (the time model): when this should resurface if nothing has happened; staleness is derived from the log, not stored. 'Done is dated' (rule 4) is a cross-field rule enforced by tools/validate.py integrity_checks().

follow_up.description: Optional: when this should resurface if nothing has happened (open question 1's placeholder).

done.description: When the action was completed. Required when status is 'done'.

log.description: Dated progress notes, oldest first — what happened last touch, what's blocked on what.
